name: Data, Privacy, Safety & Governance Framework
status: Required before Phase 2. Lightweight version for pilot. Full version before scaling.
description: Governs voice recording consent, data retention, minor safeguarding, community safety, and AI content governance.

data_collection_and_consent.principle: Explicit, informed consent before collecting voice/writing data. Consent is GRANULAR.

operational.default: Granted at onboarding (required to use the system)
operational.withdrawal: Can opt out — but cannot receive speaking feedback without it

improvement.description: Using recordings to improve AI scoring accuracy

marketing.description: Using recordings/stories for testimonials or marketing
marketing.default: Never assumed. Explicit opt-in at each use.

must_include: What data is collected (voice recordings, written text, progress scores, Discord activity)
Why it's collected (provide feedback, track progress, improve the system)
Where it's stored (Google Drive/Discord servers — not shared externally)
Who can access it (learner: own data. Moderators: coaching access. Admin: all with audit log)
How long it's kept (12 months after last activity, then archived. Deleted on request)
How to delete (DM the bot '!delete-my-data' or contact founder directly)
privacy_notice.template_ar:
سياسة الخصوصية — Empire English Community

📋 ماذا نجمع:
• تسجيلاتك الصوتية (للتقييم والتعليقات)
• كتاباتك (للتصحيح)
• درجاتك وتقدمك
• نشاطك في Discord

🎯 لماذا:
• لنعطيك تعليقات مخصصة
• لنتابع تقدمك
• لنحسّن النظام

🔒 من يشوف بياناتك:
• أنت: كل بياناتك
• المشرفون: للتوجيه فقط
• ما نشارك بياناتك مع أي طرف خارجي أبدًا

⏰ كم نحتفظ فيها:
• ١٢ شهر بعد آخر نشاط
• تقدر تطلب الحذف أي وقت

❌ حذف البيانات:
• أرسل !delete-my-data
• أو تواصل مع المؤسس مباشرة
• نحذف خلال ٧ أيام

✅ بالاستمرار، أنت توافق على جمع البيانات التشغيلية (المطلوبة لعمل النظام).
الاستخدامات الأخرى (تسويق، تحسين AI) — نطلب إذنك بشكل منفصل.

retention_and_deletion.after_retention: Data archived (not actively accessible). Permanently deleted after 24 months.

deletion_on_request.how: !delete-my-data command OR direct DM to founder
deletion_on_request.what_gets_deleted: All recordings, writing submissions, progress data, personal info from CRM
deletion_on_request.what_remains: Anonymous, aggregated statistics only (no personally identifiable data)

retention_and_deletion.right_to_access: Learner can request export of all their data at any time (!export-my-data)

role_scoped_access.buddy: Onboarding progress of assigned buddy (no recordings)
role_scoped_access.moderator: Teaching-relevant data (scores, submissions for coaching). Audit-logged.

minor_safeguarding.enforcement: Self-declared at onboarding (application form). Under-16 requires parental consent form.

parental_consent.form_includes: Parent/guardian name, relationship, contact, explicit permission for voice recording + community participation
restrictions_for_minors: No public showcase (recordings not shared in channels)
Restricted DMs (buddy only, not random members)

minor_safeguarding.note: For the pilot (9 adults), this section is documented but not yet actively enforced. Must be operational before Phase 2 (public intake).

code_of_conduct.summary: Be respectful. Be supportive. Be honest. No harassment. No hate speech. No sharing others' recordings without consent.
code_of_conduct.reporting: DM @Moderator or @Founder with description of the issue. Optionally: screenshot/recording of the violation.
code_of_conduct.response_time: Within 4 hours during active hours. Within 12 hours otherwise.

escalation_for_safety_violations.distinct_from: English-only enforcement (§8.3) — those are learning rules. These are SAFETY rules.

level_3.violation: Harassment, bullying, or making someone unsafe

level_4.violation: Hate speech, threats, or illegal content
level_4.record: Documented. Reported to Discord Trust & Safety if applicable.

voice_lounge_safety.moderator_coverage: At least one moderator/ambassador should be present during scheduled voice sessions. Unscheduled sessions are unmoderated (community self-regulates).
voice_lounge_safety.recording_consent: Voice lounges are NOT recorded by default. Any recording requires explicit announcement + opt-out opportunity.
voice_lounge_safety.safe_exit: Members can leave any voice session at any time without explanation. No pressure to stay.

human_review.pilot: Founder spot-checks 20% of AI-generated content before delivery (daily tasks, cheat sheets)
human_review.scale: Spot-check reduced to 5% once quality validated over 4+ weeks
human_review.trigger_for_full_review: Any learner report of incorrect/inappropriate AI content

learner_feedback_path.how: React with ❌ on any AI-generated content OR type !report-content
learner_feedback_path.what_happens: Content flagged for human review. Learner receives acknowledgment within 4 hours.
learner_feedback_path.never: A learner should never feel 'stuck' with AI content they believe is wrong.

bias_and_fairness.risk: AI accent scoring may be biased against specific L1 backgrounds (e.g., scoring Arabic-accented English lower than Chinese-accented English for the same intelligibility level).
bias_and_fairness.mitigation: Rater-agreement study before AI scores gate advancement (§11 refinement). Regular audit of score distributions across L1 backgrounds.
bias_and_fairness.human_override: Any learner can request human re-scoring of AI-evaluated work. This is a RIGHT, not a privilege.

pilot_minimum: Founder manually handles any safety issues
Data stored in founder-managed Google Drive
